hero.title: Hi, I'm John Doe

hero.description: I create beautiful and functional websites with a focus on user experience and modern design.

contactCTA.title: Let's Work Together
contactCTA.description: Have a project in mind or just want to chat? I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations.

story.title: My Story
story.content: I'm a passionate developer with over 5 years of experience in creating digital experiences. My journey in web development started when I was in college, and since then, I've been constantly learning and improving my skills.
